title: Kentucky National Guard Tuition Award Program
summary: 100% tuition coverage at public colleges and universities at on-campus rates. Lifetime benefit caps: $40,000 at 4-year comprehensive universities.

requirements.notes: Must have completed Basic Combat Training (or contracted ROTC/SMP). Must be passing APFT/ACFT and height/weight standards. Cannot be flagged. Must maintain satisfactory academic progress.

eligibilityNotes: KY National Guard state program pays 100% of tuition at public colleges/universities at on-campus rate (does NOT cover special course fees or late fees). Lifetime caps based on institution type: $40,000 at KY 4-year public comprehensive universities as defined by KRS 164.001(7). Does not cover winter or summer terms (use Federal TA for those). Application deadlines: April 1 for fall semester, October 1 for spring semester. Must register at https://ky.ngb.army.mil (requires CAC and military network for first-time registration). Apply at https://ky.ngb.army.mil/TuitionStudentv2. For questions contact Janet Crickmer at janet.crickmer.nfg@army.mil or 502-607-1039. Priority given to members without prior certificate/diploma from vocational program, then by application receipt date. Governed by 106 KAR 3:010.
